summary: Kept #39307 as the open non-security canonical for user-visible mid-thread compaction/reset disclosure. Routed #58830 to central security handling because its preview, confirmation, and rollback surfaces are security/privacy-sensitive. Closed linked PRs are historical partial-fix context only.
